Assembly Automation, Core Process Technology (AA CPT) of TE Connectivity has an opportunity for an intern with strong technical and team working capabilities in leading manufacturing technology deployment. Knowledge in C/C++ programming, machine vision system and embedded system is the preferred technical capabilities.

1.	Support AA CPT regional Leader to develop customized machine vision system and Digital Instrumentation system

Personal characteristics of the individual:
